name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash San Antonio, Texas — Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit up to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000 with in-store an...
description_long:
Speedy Cash operates physical storefronts across the Memphis, Tennessee area, including the Summer Avenue location in Memphis. The company focuses on providing short-term lending solutions designed for consumers who need quick access to cash. With multiple store locations in Memphis and nearby Bartlett, Speedy Cash has established a local retail presence for in-person lending services.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans up to $425 with repayment due around the next pay period, Lines of Credit up to $4,000 that allow borrowers to draw funds as needed against an approved limit, and Title Loans up to $4,000 using a vehicle as collateral. All three products are designed for rapid approval and funding. Beyond lending, Speedy Cash provides ancillary money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot Visa Debit Card services at most retail locations.

Speedy Cash distinguishes itself through in-store customer service, allowing borrowers to ask questions throughout the application process and review loan terms with staff before signing. The company emphasizes transparency about costs and terms upfront, stating applicants "will know exactly how much it costs to borrow the funds prior to signing." They offer both in-store and online application options, with extended store hours (9am-7pm most weekdays) to accommodate working consumers. The Memphis location provides same-day or next-business-day service.

As a short-term lender, Speedy Cash serves consumers in financial emergencies but operates in a category known for high costs. While the company provides fast funding and flexible repayment terms, payday and title loans typically carry substantial interest rates and fees. Borrowers should carefully review the specific APR and total cost before committing. The requirement for a vehicle title for title loans limits accessibility, and payday loans with 14-day terms can create debt cycles if not managed carefully.
pros: Multiple loan products available: payday loans, lines of credit, and title loans up to $4,000
Same-day or next-business-day funding available for qualified applicants
Extended hours including evening (until 7pm) and weekend service (open Saturdays 9am-4pm)
In-store staff available to explain terms and answer questions before signing loan documents
Transparent pricing: applicants know exact cost upfront before committing
Flexible line of credit product allows drawing only what's needed up to approved limit
Multiple nearby locations in Memphis area (9 stores listed) for convenient access
Additional money services: check cashing, wire transfers, money orders in-store
cons: Payday loans capped at $425, requiring multiple loans or products for larger needs
No specific APR or fee information disclosed on website; actual costs unknown to consumers browsing
Requires valid government ID, proof of employment/income, and proof of address—excludes unemployed and undocumented consumers
Short repayment terms (payday loans due next pay period) increase risk of repeat borrowing and debt cycles
Title loans require vehicle appraisal in-store and clear title, which may be unavailable to many borrowers
best_for: Employed consumers needing $100-$425 urgently with stable next paycheck
Vehicle owners with unexpected expenses who can secure title loans up to $4,000
Consumers who prefer in-person interaction and staff guidance over online-only lenders
Customers needing check cashing, money orders, or wire transfers alongside lending
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for employed consumers in Memphis seeking fast emergency cash of $425 or less, or vehicle owners needing larger title loans. The main caveat is that payday and title loans typically carry high interest rates and short terms that can trap borrowers in debt cycles; consumers should exhaust alternatives (employer advances, credit unions, family) before applying.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card services
